title: Colorflow
description: Professional color picker & gradient generator for builders - find the perfect blocks for any color palette!
body:
# Colorflow

> The ultimate color tool for Minecraft builders

![Fabric 1.21.4](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-1.21.4-blue)
![Client-Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client%20Only-green)
![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow)

---

## What is Colorflow?

**Colorflow** is a professional-grade color picking and gradient generation tool built right into Minecraft. Inspired by design tools like Figma, Photoshop, and Coolors, it gives builders the power to find the perfect blocks for any color palette.

---

## Features

### Professional Color Picker
- **2D Saturation/Value Palette** - Click and drag to pick your perfect shade
- **Hue Spectrum Bar** - Full rainbow selection
- **RGB Sliders** - Fine-tune individual color channels
- **HEX Input** - Enter exact color codes
- **Live Preview** - See your color with light/dark variations

### Smart Block Matching
- Automatically finds the **9 closest blocks** to any color
- Uses **Delta-E 2000** algorithm for perceptual accuracy
- Works with **ALL blocks** including modded ones
- Filter by "Full Blocks Only" for cleaner builds

### Gradient Generator
- **Visual Block Browser** - Browse all blocks with search
- **Click-to-Select** - Easy start/end block selection
- **9-Step Gradients** - Perfect for smooth color transitions
- **One-Click Hotbar Fill** - Instantly apply to inventory

---

## License

MIT License - Free to use in modpacks!
